name: Voltron
description: Breakthrough chemigenetic design using HaloTag-bound Janelia Fluor dyes, delivering exceptional brightness and photostability that opened the door to long-term in vivo voltage imaging.

researchPapers.sample: Mouse, somatosensory cortex layer 1, in vivo

researchPapers.title: VolPy: Automated and scalable analysis pipelines for voltage imaging datasets
researchPapers.sample: Mouse cortex L1 and hippocampus; larval zebrafish tegmentum, in vivo

researchPapers.title: High-speed multiplane confocal microscopy for voltage imaging in densely labeled neuronal populations
researchPapers.sample: Mouse, neocortex (motor and somatosensory cortex), in vivo and ex vivo

researchPapers.title: Large-scale deep tissue voltage imaging with targeted-illumination confocal microscopy
researchPapers.sample: Mouse, neocortex (motor, somatosensory, visual cortex) and hippocampal CA1, in vivo

researchPapers.title: Synchronous ensembles of hippocampal CA1 pyramidal neurons during novel exploration
researchPapers.sample: Mouse, hippocampal CA1 pyramidal layer, in vivo

researchPapers.title: Voltage imaging reveals circuit computations in the raphe underlying serotonin-mediated motor vigor learning
researchPapers.sample: Larval zebrafish, serotonergic raphe (DRN), in vivo
